cache._maxEntrySizeComment: 50MB — single entries larger than this are never cached

originBudgets._comment: Cache space budget per origin type. Prevents ad creatives from evicting static assets.

cache._compressionThresholdComment: Blobs > 10KB are gzip-compressed on disk to save space. Hot cache holds uncompressed copies.

stealth._comment: injectViaHeader=false means no Via header is added to upstream requests. exposeDebugHeaders=false means no x-edgeproxy headers on responses. Both protect against ad-network fingerprinting.

memory._maxHotBlobBytesComment: 256MB LRU in-memory hot cache for recently-served blobs (always uncompressed)
memory._preloadBlobsComment: Set true to pre-warm hot cache from disk on startup (slower init, faster first hit)

concurrency._indexFlushDebounceMsComment: Wait 2s after last write before persisting index to disk.
concurrency._ipcPollMsComment: Every 5s, check if another process has updated the index (IPC via index-version.json).
concurrency._staleCleanupMsComment: Every 30min, remove expired entries + low-value entries (hitCount < 2, age > 7d).

logging.description: 0=silent, 1=error, 2=warn, 3=info, 4=debug+file. Zero console output at all levels. format: 'text' (default) or 'json' for structured logging.
